reason: Successfully verified agent can receive a message and respond correctly with the answer to "2+2?"
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing agent list in sidebar with "QA-20260720-225916-ngpa" visible with "idle" status
Click on "QA-20260720-225916-ngpa" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened, showing status "idle", message input field, and agent configuration panel
Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status indicator confirms agent is in "idle" state, which is acceptable per test requirements
Send message: "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into input field (ref=e189) and sent via send button (ref=e342), triggering session creation
Wait up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent responded immediately with "4" within 1 second (as shown by "Worked for 1s" indicator), well within the 3-minute timeout
Verify the response mentions "4" — Response clearly displays "4" in the chat conversation, matching the expected answer. Screenshot captured showing complete message exchange.
